title: Official MironMC - Cobblemon
description: MironMC is a feature-rich Cobblemon modpack server with player gyms, quests, custom biomes, economy, and more! Battle, build, and trade in a vibrant world of Pokémon. Join us for a fun, community-driven experience like no other!
body: MironMC is a feature-rich Cobblemon modpack server with player gyms, quests, custom biomes, economy, and more! Battle, build, and trade in a vibrant world of Pokémon. Join us for a fun, community-driven experience like no other!
